concepts.title: DAGs (Directed Acyclic Graphs) and causal assumptions
concepts.hook: Visually encode causal structure; enables identification of estimands.

concepts.title: Confounders, colliders, mediators
concepts.hook: Types of nodes with different blocking and conditioning implications.

concepts.title: Backdoor criterion
concepts.hook: Conditions for valid adjustment sets that block confounding paths.

concepts.title: Frontdoor criterion
concepts.hook: Identifies causal effect when confounder unmeasured but mediator observed.

concepts.title: Randomized experiments as gold standard
concepts.hook: RCTs eliminate confounding; but often infeasible.

concepts.title: Matching and propensity scores
concepts.hook: Match treated and control units on observed confounders; reduces model dependence.

concepts.title: Difference-in-differences
concepts.hook: Compares trends; eliminates constant unobserved confounders.

concepts.title: Instrumental variables (IV)
concepts.hook: Uses exogenous variation to identify causal effects despite endogeneity.

concepts.title: Regression discontinuity
concepts.hook: Exploits cutoff in assignment; quasi-experimental design.

concepts.title: Unconfoundedness and SUTVA assumptions
concepts.hook: Strong assumptions; rarely fully hold in practice.

concepts.title: Sensitivity analysis for hidden bias
concepts.hook: How robust are conclusions to violations of unconfoundedness?

concepts.title: Mediation analysis
concepts.hook: Decompose total effect into direct and indirect paths.
